info.description:
Exberry Admin API allows managing exchange static data (instruments, trading calendars and more) as well as sending operational commands (EOD, halt trading and more).

**Sandbox environment endpoint:** `https://admin-api.uat.exberry-uat.io`

**Guidelines:**
- All numbers are stringified unless explicitly mentioned otherwise. Stringified integers are marked with pattern `^-?[0-9]+$`; stringified decimals with `format: decimal`.
- Optional fields should be omitted from request if not required
- System ignores any additional parameter that are sent on request body but was not specified in this document

**HTTP Error Codes:**
- 400: Maximum request size exceeded (60KB) or Invalid JSON
- 401: Invalid token
- 403: Authentication and authorization errors
- 404: Route not found
- 500: Any other error
- 503: System not available
- 504: Timeout

tags.Authentication: Authenticate with the email and password provided by the Exberry team to receive a JWT token. Use it as a Bearer token on every other request. Regenerate before expiresIn elapses.

Get_Token.description:
Exchanges email + password for a JWT bearer token.

#### Error Codes

| Code | Message |
| --- | --- |
| 2 | Wrong email or password |
| 10000 | Please login to Admin Application before using API |

schema_descriptions.Instrument.properties.symbol: Unique instrument symbol. Max length 16. Allowed characters: a-Z, 0-9, - . ^ = /
